subcodes.first_line: ...It is at such times that the friends of God avail themselves of the occasion, seize the opportunity, rush forth and win the prize
subcodes.first_line_orig: چنين اوقات ياران الهی فرصتی يابند و وقت غنيمت شمرند و جولان کنند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @call to action
